channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Unbearable heat suspected in 19 New Jersey deaths as high temperatures give way to thunderstorms
item.description: Several days of scorching temperatures are suspected to have caused at least 19 deaths in New Jersey as a heat dome that had settled above parts of the central and eastern United States gives way to severe storms that have knocked out power to close to 1 million homes and businesses.

item.title: National Guard members on patrol in Memphis fatally shoot man during pursuit, police say
Prosecutors argue the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk should stand trial
